verdict_reasoning: HSPA1A (HSP70) is canonically cytosolic but is well-documented to translocate to the outer leaflet of stressed and tumor cells (membrane HSP70 / mHsp70), serving as a tumor-selective surface marker targeted by clinical agents (e.g., cmHsp70.1 antibody, TKD-peptide approaches). Cancer/stress-induced ecto-display qualifies as contextual cell-state-induced surfacing.
